Fantasy RPG UI Icons Pack - 32x32
Style: Dark Fantasy MMO (inspired by Black Desert Mobile / similar Korean MMORPGs)
Frame: Dark navy gradient background + gold beveled border
Total Icons: 48 individual PNGs + 1 spritesheet

Usage: Drop the PNG files into your game's UI atlas or use individually.
All icons are RGBA, transparent background outside the frame.

=== ICON LIST ===

--- Inventory & Economy ---
  • ui_icon_bag.png
  • ui_icon_equipment.png
  • ui_icon_equipment_upgrade.png
  • ui_icon_craft.png
  • ui_icon_shop.png
  • ui_icon_town_shop.png
  • ui_icon_auction.png
  • ui_icon_warehouse.png
  • ui_icon_gold.png
  • ui_icon_gem.png

--- Weapons ---
  • ui_icon_sword.png
  • ui_icon_bow.png
  • ui_icon_staff.png
  • ui_icon_shield.png
  • ui_icon_hammer.png

--- Skills & Magic ---
  • ui_icon_skill_fire.png
  • ui_icon_skill_ice.png
  • ui_icon_skill_lightning.png
  • ui_icon_skill_heal.png
  • ui_icon_skill_buff.png
  • ui_icon_skill_debuff.png
  • ui_icon_skill_poison.png
  • ui_icon_skill_ultimate.png

  • ui_icon_chat_bubble.png

  • ui_icon_player.png

  • ui_icon_rift_seal.png
  • ui_icon_seal_rift.png

--- Resources & Status ---
  • ui_icon_heart.png
  • ui_icon_star.png
  • ui_icon_hp_restore.png
  • ui_icon_mp_restore.png
  • ui_icon_awakening.png

--- Items & Misc ---
  • ui_icon_potion.png
  • ui_icon_key.png
  • ui_icon_mount.png
  • ui_icon_pet.png
  • ui_icon_attack.png
  • ui_icon_defend.png
  • ui_icon_guild_member.png


Spritesheet layout: 8 columns x 6 rows (left to right, top to bottom order matches the list above)
Recommended for: Mobile/PC MMORPG UI, inventory, skill bars, minimap markers, buttons.
Created for game development / modding / prototyping.
